market_pulse: LIV dominates competitor activity with strong artist lineup (DJ Precise, John Summit, Ship Wrek); Zouk gaining momentum as new innovator on Strip; Tao Beach leveraging tropical aesthetic via Kygo partnership and EDC positioning.

content_gaps.description: Tropical/island house sound emerging as dominant theme across Tao Beach, Palm Tree Beach Club, and Zouk — tropical beats, beach vibes, sunset content
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV should develop tropical/island-inspired house content series for summer positioning; feature tropical beats in Beach Club promotions

content_gaps.description: Competitor TikTok strategy heavily features influencer takeovers and creator spotlights (e.g., @globeth0tter guest reviews at XS, user outfit guides at OMNIA/Hakkasan)

content_gaps.description: Encore Beach Club and Hakkasan actively posting countdown content and flash announcements (Diplo & Ric Flair on 4/18, R&Bae Wednesdays at Hakkasan)
